ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically enter fullscreen when enabling zen mode.
ast.target: 启用禅模式时自动进入全屏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to show the exit button in zen mode. You can also exit via the command palette, by pressing esc, or by assigning a hotkey to the 'toggle zen mode' command.
ast.target: 何时在禅模式下显示退出按钮。您也可以通过命令面板、按Esc键或为“切换禅模式”命令分配热键来退出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the exit button is hidden on desktop but reveals itself on hover as long as the zen mode exit button is on.
ast.target: 启用后，退出按钮在桌面上隐藏，但只要禅模式退出按钮处于开启状态，悬停时就会显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide properties when zen mode is active.
ast.target: 禅模式激活时隐藏属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the inline title (note title) when zen mode is active.
ast.target: 禅模式激活时隐藏内联标题（笔记标题）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the status bar when zen mode is active.
ast.target: 禅模式激活时隐藏状态栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide linked mentions when zen mode is active.
ast.target: 禅模式激活时隐藏链接提及。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide scroll bar when zen mode is active.
ast.target: 禅模式激活时隐藏滚动条。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Top padding in pixels (0-100).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bottom padding in pixels (0-100).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show the active file in zen mode, hide all other panes.
ast.target: 禅模式下仅显示活动文件，隐藏所有其他窗格。
